address: 1444 Mountain Air Tr , Fort Worth, Texas 76131
description:
This is a great property ready for new owner. Don't miss this opportunity to pick up a great investment property in the highly desirable North Fort Worth area! Whether you're looking for your next fix-and-flip, rental, or buy-and-hold investment, this property has strong potential. 

Property Highlights: Located in a well-established neighborhood with excellent access to major highways, shopping, dining, and schools. With a strong rental demand in the area its a great opportunity to add value through updates and improvements. Ideal for investors looking to build equity. This property is being offered as-is. Buyer to perform their own due diligence regarding condition, square footage, schools, taxes, ARV, repairs, and all other property information. Low $300k ARV.
